european.description: A sweeping claim of territory that hits harder against unfamiliar types.
An unstoppable wave of historical devastation.
Mass production that steamrolls through agricultural staples.

mediterranean_middle_eastern.description: A valuable exchange that peaks when served as a starter.
Pure extraction that perfectly complements fresh produce.

east_southwest_asian.description: A massive yield that requires a period of rest afterward.
A grand feast that spills over to damage the entire enemy party.

latin_american_caribbean.description: Mineral-rich soil that makes starch-heavy types crumble.
A rhythmic celebration of vibrant, fresh ingredients.

south_asian_india.description: A storm of seasoning that strikes multiple times.
Traditional wisdom that expertly breaks down heavy proteins.

raw.description: The crisp bite of nature that dominates other plant life.
Pure, unadulterated energy straight from the source.

braised.description: A deep, penetrating heat that tenderizes everything.
Heavy pressure that melts through even the toughest proteins.

fried.description: Searing hot oil that punishes meat-based targets.
A crunchy, satisfying blow from a hardened exterior.

bake.description: Building heat that grows more powerful with every turn.
A scorching gust of air from the oven's core.

whole_foods.description: A solid hit backed by high nutritional density.
Dense roughage that pushes right through grain-based foes.

processed.description: Artificial additives that react poorly with natural produce.
A strike that lingers long after the initial hit.

ultra_processed.description: An explosive burst of energy that leaves the user drained.
An overwhelming wave of salt that dehydrates the target.

appetizer.description: A quick, light attack designed to catch the opponent off guard.
A refreshing strike that resets the field.

entree.description: A massive, filling blow that crushes meat-based opponents.
A decisive finishing move that requires total exertion.

dessert.description: A sweet assault that overloads grain-based defenses.
A dense and heavy strike to end the battle.

cold.description: A numbing chill that shocks the system.
Cold storage strike that freezes meat-heavy targets.

hot.description: Scalding vapor that burns on contact.
White-hot intensity that damages both the target and the user.

room_temperature.description: A neutral, consistent attack with no drawbacks.
A steady blow that relies on equilibrium.

crispy.description: A sharp, audible strike that shatters dry grains.
Jagged edges that pierce through the opponent.

liquid.description: An overwhelming flow that engulfs the target.
A washing force that sweeps away lighter vegetables.

chewy.description: A relentless, gummy assault that wears the target down.
A flexible strike that whips forward with high speed.

quick.description: High heat, high speed, and immediate results.
A fast dusting of flavor that hits before the target can react.

slow_cook.description: A long-awaited blow that delivers devastating power.
A concentrated attack that has simmered to perfection.

no_cook.description: No prep required—just straight to the action.
A quick combination of fresh garden ingredients.
